bead.title: artifact-types: cli/internal/artifacttypes/ loader + index + mtime cache + path-escape guard
bead.description: New package cli/internal/artifacttypes/. Scans <plugin>/workflows/**/artifacts/*/meta.yml by default; respects package.yaml.artifact_type_roots opt-in. Normalizes to {plugin, typeId, name, description, prefix, pattern, phase, templatePath, promptPath, examples[], sourceMetaPath}. mtime-based cache. Path-escape guard for plugin paths.
bead.acceptance: 1. Loader package built. 2. mtime cache invalidates correctly. 3. Path-escape guard refuses meta.yml outside the plugin tree. 4. Tests cover both new + legacy meta.yml shapes.
